reasoning: The prediction market priced this at 4% in late July 2025. Searches reveal that Meta released Llama 4 (Scout and Maverick) in April 2025, but the flagship public model, Maverick, ranked poorly (~32nd) on Chatbot Arena after controversy surrounding evaluation manipulation ('juicing'). Meta's planned 2-trillion parameter model, Llama 4 Behemoth, experienced severe delays due to architectural flaws and performance issues, with mid-July reports from the NYT indicating Meta was considering abandoning the model entirely. Given this catastrophic disruption to their flagship release timeline and the intense competition from Google (Gemini 2.5), xAI (Grok 3), and OpenAI, it is extremely unlikely Meta will rebound with a top-ranking model by December 31, 2025. I am forecasting 2%, slightly below the late July market consensus to fully account for the July reports of Behemoth potentially being abandoned.
